name: Fried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and remove a thin piece from the stem end. Cut the tomatoes into slices about one-half inch thick.
2. Beat the egg slightly, then add water. Dip the tomatoes in this mixture and roll them in bread crumbs seasoned with salt and pepper.
3. Allow the coated tomatoes to dry somewhat before frying.
4. Heat fat in a heavy skillet. Place the coated tomatoes in the hot fat and brown on one side.
5. Carefully turn the tomatoes, reducing the temperature so they have time to cook without burning.
6. Remove from the skillet to a hot platter, garnish with chopped parsley, and serve immediately.
